topStories.description: He was speaking after inaugurating a programme at Mahavira Bhavan on the occasion of Janma Kalyanaka, Lord Mahavira’s birth anniversary

topStories.title: Russia Concerned With Possibility Of US Taking Control Of Afghan Airbase: Putin's Envoy
topStories.description: The Bagram airbase, located near the capital city, Kabul, was built in the 1950s by the erstwhile USSR and was widely used by the Soviet forces during their intervention in Afghanistan.

topStories.title: Trump shares letter about ‘only way to Heaven’ as Pope Leo says ‘God doesn't listen to prayers of those who make war'
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump shared a letter from evangelist Franklin Graham discussing faith and the path to Heaven. Graham praised Trump’s leadership in peacemaking and urged conservatives to unite against the Democrat agenda. This follows Graham’s prior endorsement of Trump at CPAC.

topStories.title: Restricting social harm: US verdicts expose social media's design flaws - Business Standard
topStories.description: Restricting social harm: US verdicts expose social media's design flaws  Business Standard

topStories.title: Iran Accuses US Of "Secretly" Plotting Ground Attack Despite Diplomatic Talk
topStories.description: The speaker of Iran's parliament accused the United States on Sunday of plotting a ground attack despite publicly pushing for a negotiated deal, after a US warship with around 3,500 military personnel...

topStories.title: New images show destruction of $300 million USAF E-3 Sentry, struck by Iranian missile in Saudi's Prince Sultan Air Base
topStories.description: Iran's IRGC reportedly destroyed a US AWACS plane, leading to significant military losses. Ukrainian intelligence suggests Russia may have aided Iran by providing satellite imagery. The US has lost numerous military assets, with costs estimated between $1.4 billion and $2.9 billion.

topStories.title: Dubai, Abu Dhabi at risk if UAE enters Iran war, says top US economist Jeffrey Sachs
topStories.description: Sachs highlighted the vulnerability of key cities like Dubai and Abu Dhabi, speaking to ANI, noting they are designed as global tourism and financial hubs rather than military strongholds.

topStories.title: ‘Extradition? say the word…’ Somaliland’s blistering reply intensifies Ilhan Omar–Vance clash
topStories.description: Speaking in a podcast interview with commentator Benny Johnson, Vance said the administration is examining possible legal avenues. “We think Ilhan Omar definitely committed immigration fraud against the United States of America,” Vance said.

topStories.title: Three arrested in Paris after attempted bomb attack outside Bank of America
topStories.description: France's anti-terrorism prosecutor's office said it had immediately taken over the investigation.

topStories.title: Texas tragedy - Woman visiting cancer-stricken friend killed in ‘carjacking attack,' reveals report
topStories.description: The victim — Marietta Allison had travelled from Austin to be with her friend, Cassie Daniel, who was receiving treatment for stage 4 ovarian cancer

topStories.title: Israeli police block Catholic cardinal from Holy Sepulchre on Palm Sunday
topStories.description: Since the US and Israel launched a war on Iran, Israel has closed holy sites in Jerusalem, citing safety concerns.

dailyNews.description: Since the US and Israel launched a war on Iran, Israel has closed holy sites in Jerusalem, citing safety concerns.

dailyNews.title: Middle East War: Ukraine's Zelenskyy accuses Russia of assisting Iran with satellite images, intel of US air base
dailyNews.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy, on Saturday (local time), accused Russia of assisting Iran in its war against US by sharing satellite images and intel. Zelenskyy, citing daily intelligence update, said that Moscow shared images of some of the facilities that Tehran has targeted

dailyNews.title: How the US memeifies its war on Iran
dailyNews.description: Al Jazeera’s Linh Nguyen explains the new era of war propaganda.

dailyNews.title: Pakistan maintains ‘delicate balancing act’ as it hosts Iran talks
dailyNews.description: Foreign ministers meet in Islamabad, seeking to de-escalate the US-Israel war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: ‘Nowhere is really safe’: Iranian dissidents grapple with US war in Iran
dailyNews.description: Critics of Iran's government say they fear retribution while in exile, as well as growing anti-immigrant sentiment.

dailyNews.title: Scathing report claims nation's oldest labor union 'betrayed' MAGA members through 'shocking' spending
dailyNews.description: A watchdog report alleges railroad union BLET spent 99% of party donations on Democrats, despite data suggesting its members largely back President Donald Trump.

dailyNews.title: Ex-Vikings star Joey Browner dead at 65
dailyNews.description: Joey Browner, a former Minnesota Vikings and Tampa Bay Buccaneers defensive back, has died. He was 65. Browner earned six Pro Bowl selections in his career.

dailyNews.title: Daughter of Air Canada flight attendant ejected from crash provides update, details mother's injuries
dailyNews.description: Air Canada flight attendant Solange Tremblay survived the LaGuardia runway crash with shattered legs and a fractured spine, her daughter says in a GoFundMe appeal.

dailyNews.title: Border czar Tom Homan rips Congress for paid vacation as TSA agents struggle without pay
dailyNews.description: Border czar Tom Homan told CNN’s Jake Tapper that unpaid TSA agents were "struggling" to feed their families and pay rent, while Congress remained stuck in a funding fight.

dailyNews.title: Tom Cotton slams Democrats' 'temper tantrum' for fueling TSA chaos amid funding fight
dailyNews.description: Sen. Tom Cotton says Democrats' fight over ICE funding is causing TSA chaos, with hours-long airport wait times hitting travelers nationwide.

dailyNews.title: UFC fighter Alexa Grasso delivers vicious KO to Maycee Barber
dailyNews.description: UFC flyweight fighter Alexa Grasso viciously knocked out Maycee Barber during their fight at UFC Seattle on Saturday night. She's emerged as a contender for the title

dailyNews.title: New pro-AI group backed by Trump allies plans $100M midterm spending push
dailyNews.description: AI is emerging as a key political battleground as a new $100M pro-industry group enters the 2026 midterms to back deregulation and counter stricter rules.

dailyNews.title: Kurt Russell reflects on humble upbringing, says he once lived in an attic in LA
dailyNews.description: Kurt Russell recalls living in an attic in East LA as a child after his father left baseball to pursue acting, reflecting on his humble beginnings.

topStories.title: Trump shares letter about ‘only way to Heaven’ as Pope Leo says ‘God doesn't listen to prayers of those who make war'
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump shared a letter from evangelist Franklin Graham discussing faith and the path to Heaven. Graham praised Trump’s leadership in peacemaking and urged conservatives to unite against the Democrat agenda. This follows Graham’s prior endorsement of Trump at CPAC.

topStories.description: A watchdog report alleges railroad union BLET spent 99% of party donations on Democrats, despite data suggesting its members largely back President Donald Trump.

topStories.title: New pro-AI group backed by Trump allies plans $100M midterm spending push
topStories.description: AI is emerging as a key political battleground as a new $100M pro-industry group enters the 2026 midterms to back deregulation and counter stricter rules.

topStories.title: Left in limbo, Afghans who served with the U.S. fear Trump could send them back to the Taliban
topStories.description: On a former U.S. military base in Qatar, Afghans who supported the United States in its 20-year war against the Taliban have been left in limbo, living in windowless shipping containers far from the new lives they were once promised in the U.S.Now, the Trump administration is presenting them with a stark choice: move to an unspecified third country or return to Taliban-ruled Afghanistan, where they potentially face persecution, imprisonment or death

topStories.title: Zelenskyy asked if Trump cares about the future of Ukraine
topStories.description: In an interview with NBC News’ Raf Sanchez, President Zelenskyy says that he hopes President Trump cares about the future of Ukraine, but “they care about the United States more.”

topStories.title: Transcript: Jerome Adams on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," March 29, 2026
topStories.description: The following is the transcript of the interview with Jerome Adams, surgeon general in the first Trump administration, that aired on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" on March 29, 2026.

topStories.title: Rand Paul on being a Republican willing to check the president on various policies
topStories.description: Kentucky Sen. Rand Paul addresses President Trump's decision to launch strikes against Iran, the new Department of Homeland Security secretary and the 2028 election.

topStories.title: Rep. Jim Himes accuses Trump of "flat-out lying" about negotiating with Iran
topStories.description: Rep. Jim Himes, the top Democrat on the House Intelligence Committee, told "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" that he believes President Trump was "flat-out lying" last week about negotiations with Iran, accusing the president of having "made up" having talks after facing "financial cataclysm on Monday."

topStories.title: Ex-Surgeon General says "addictive" social media needs to be regulated "similar to cigarettes"
topStories.description: Jerome Adams, who served as surgeon general in the first Trump administration, told "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" that he's "happy that we're having a conversation" about the social media addiction, saying that the U.S. needs to "similar to cigarettes, point out the fact that these substances, meaning social media platforms, are incredibly addictive."

topStories.title: Transcript: Tom Homan on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," March 29, 2026
topStories.description: The following is the transcript of the interview with Tom Homan, Trump administration border czar, that aired on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" on March 29, 2026.

topStories.title: Tom Homan says ICE will remain assisting TSA "until the airports feel like they are 100%"
topStories.description: Tom Homan, the Trump administration border czar, told "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" that while President Trump has signed a bill to pay TSA agents, ICE will remain assisting them "until the airports feel like they are 100% … in a place where they can do normal operations."

topStories.title: 5 Takeaways From the ‘No Kings’ Rallies as the Midterms Heat Up
topStories.description: The war in Iran was a galvanizing force, but plenty of protesters focused on President Trump’s immigration crackdown. Senate candidates in several key races joined the crowds.

dailyNews.title: 5 Takeaways From the ‘No Kings’ Rallies as the Midterms Heat Up
dailyNews.description: The war in Iran was a galvanizing force, but plenty of protesters focused on President Trump’s immigration crackdown. Senate candidates in several key races joined the crowds.

dailyNews.title: ICE May Remain at Airports Even After T.S.A. Pay Resumes, Border Czar Says
dailyNews.description: Transportation safety officers are set to be paid on Monday, but Tom Homan, the White House’s border czar, said ICE agents may stay where there are shortages.

dailyNews.title: Middle East leaders huddle in Pakistan as Trump weighs ground operations in Iran
dailyNews.description: Foreign ministers of Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, Turkey and Egypt all arrived in Islamabad to discuss the evolving regional situation in the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: Trump ban on investor homebuying may come at cost of a bigger real estate deal
dailyNews.description: President Trump's plan to ban big investors from home ownership may not be the key to reviving the American Dream in affordable housing legislation.

dailyNews.title: Not everyone can expect a bigger tax refund this year — what's actually driving your result
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump has said this will be the "largest tax refund season of all time," as a result of his "big beautiful bill." Here's what the megabill means for taxpayers.

dailyNews.title: How the big oil and gas CEOs think the Iran war supply disruption will play out
dailyNews.description: The oil industry's grim outlook for global oil and gas supplies stands in contrast to the Trump administration's promise that the disruption is short term.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Pentagon prepares for weeks of ground operations in Iran
dailyNews.description: If President Trump approves the plans, such an effort would mark a new phase of the war that could be significantly more dangerous to U.S. troops than the first four weeks.

dailyNews.title: MAGA’s eruption has so far kept Trump from endorsing in key Senate race
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump seemed set to endorse Sen. John Cornyn in the Texas Republican primary runoff. But strong opposition from MAGA activists forestalled that.

dailyNews.title: Trump ratchets up attacks on NATO, says U.S. no longer needs alliance
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump suggested the U.S. might move away from its commitment to defend NATO allies, criticizing them for not supporting the war in Iran.
